title: Sweden API Scorer
description: Scores normalized ApiRecords using the three-factor model defined in the study: discovery relevance (55%), implementation readiness (30%), metadata completeness (15%). Emits ScoreBreakdown per record.

query.description: Optional search query to compute discovery relevance against

source_file.description: Path to JSONL file of ApiRecords (alternative to stdin)

output_schema.description: Emits data events with {api_record, score_breakdown} pairs
